education.institution: Sri Ramachandra Faculty of Engineering and Technology
education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics

highlights: Created a module using Opik's evaluation framework to streamline evaluation processes, migrating existing heuristic and LLM metrics onto the platform and standardizing implementations for enhanced API integration consistency.

Analyzed the RAGAS codebase to adapt LLM, SQL, and NLP metrics for agentic, RAG, and other tasks, alongside heuristic metrics, for Opik integration, optimizing metric portability for robust API-based evaluations.

Standardized input formats for agentic metrics, including agentic goal accuracy, agentic tool call accuracy, and agentic topic adherence, and developed a FastAPI endpoint for seamless metric invocation and API integration.

projects.name: Karen
highlights: Developed an AI-powered Discord moderation platform that analyzes messages in real time using a locally hosted LLM (Llama 3.2 via Ollama), classifying toxic content by category and severity to automate moderation workflows.
Engineered a three-service architecture comprising a Discord bot, Express API, and React dashboard, implementing Discord OAuth 2.0 and JWT authentication for secure moderation management.
Built real-time moderation pipelines with Socket.io and configurable offense tracking, enabling live dashboard updates and repeat-offender detection.

projects.name: Messaging App
highlights: Developed a real-time messaging platform supporting user authentication, friend management, and instant conversations.
Engineered a relational database schema with Prisma to efficiently manage users, friendships, conversations, participants, and messages.
Implemented REST APIs secured with Supabase JWT, integrating Socket.io for real-time message delivery and live conversation updates.

projects.name: Blog Platform
highlights: Developed a full-stack blogging platform enabling users to create, edit, and manage blog posts through a secure RESTful architecture.
Developed REST APIs supporting CRUD operations for posts, comments, and user management, securing protected endpoints with Passport.js and JWT authentication.
Built separate React frontends: an author CMS for content management and a public client for readers, integrated with a shared authenticated REST API.
